tools.name: kaspa_toccata_status
tools.description: Kaspa Toccata hardfork tracker: live activation distance, network-measured ETA, post-fork parameter reference. First-mover fork analytics from direct network measurement. Informational research data - not investment advice. $0.05

tools.name: kaspa_fee_regime
tools.description: Kaspa fee-market regime: fee-bucket distribution incl. the sub-floor segment the Toccata minimum displaces. Unique pre/post-hardfork fee analytics. Informational research data - not investment advice. $0.05

tools.name: kaspa_throughput_health
tools.description: Kaspa throughput & DAG-width: chain-block rate, estimated total DAG rate, TPS vs multi-month pre-fork baseline - hardfork impact tracking. Informational research data - not investment advice. $0.10

tools.name: kaspa_timeseries
tools.description: Historical Kaspa network metric as aggregated timeseries (max 1000 points). Metrics: hashrate, difficulty, block_rate, mempool_tx_count, peer_count, daa_score, tip_count, node_hashrate, circulating_supply, pct_mined. Intervals: 5m|1h|1d. from_iso/to_iso are ISO-8601 timestamps. Months of continuous

tools.name: bittensor_subnet_stake_flows
tools.description: dTAO stake-flow microstructure per subnet: per-neuron accumulation/distribution, net flow, concentration trend from months of continuous high-cadence snapshots. Informational research data - not investment advice. $0.10

tools.name: bittensor_subnet_coordination
tools.description: Neutral Bittensor subnet concentration & synchrony metrics: stake/emission concentration, validator dominance, update-synchrony with 7d comparison. Informational research data - not investment advice. $0.10

tools.name: btc_miner_attribution
tools.description: Bitcoin mining-pool hashrate share derived from coinbase scriptSig parsing. Returns block-count + share % per pool for window (1h/24h/7d/30d), with explicit Unknown bucket for long-tail small pools. $0.03

tools.name: btc_ordinals_flow
tools.description: Hourly Bitcoin Ordinals inscriptions + OP_RETURN byte volume. Inscriptions detected via witness-envelope magic bytes (�cord). Window up to 7d. $0.02

tools.name: btc_coin_days_destroyed
tools.description: Hourly Bitcoin Coin Days Destroyed proxy (consolidation_ratio × fee_weight × volume) + whale-tx contribution. ⚠️ PROXY methodology - suitable for trend signals, not absolute reserve-coin-age accounting. $0.03

tools.name: btc_diversity
tools.description: Bitcoin own-node peer-network diversity (IPv4/IPv6/Tor/I2P/CJDNS distribution) + privacy share. AI agent API for privacy researchers, node-operator tooling, network-health analytics. Informational research data - not investment advice. $0.02

tools.name: btc_mempool_pressure
tools.description: Bitcoin mempool pressure classification (low/medium/high/extreme) + fee buckets (0-1, 1-2, 2-5, 5-10, 10-20, 20-50, 50-100, 100-200, 200+ sat/vB) + RBF count + CPFP candidate count. Updated every 5 min. $0.02

tools.name: btc_fee_curve
tools.description: Bitcoin smart-fee curve for 1/3/6/12/24/144-block confirmation targets + trend classification (rising/stable/falling/surging) from 2h moving average. $0.02

tools.name: btc_blocks
tools.description: Deep per-block Bitcoin extract. Returns miner-pool attribution, witness/taproot adoption %, Ordinals inscription count, OP_RETURN byte volume, fee percentiles (10/25/50/75/90), UTXO delta, segwit %, total output BTC, block weight. $0.02

tools.name: btc_blocks_range
tools.description: Bulk Bitcoin block extract (max 144 blocks per call = $1.44 cap). Returns array of per-block summaries (height, time, miner pool, tx count, witness/taproot/ordinals/op_return stats, total output, coinbase reward). $0.01

tools.name: btc_coinbase_messages
tools.description: Curated Bitcoin coinbase scriptSig messages (printable ASCII only). Pool tags, BIP-comment campaigns, political statements. Window up to 7d. $0.02

tools.name: kaspa_dag_state
tools.description: Kaspa BlockDAG topology snapshot: tips, sink, virtual chain, pruning point, blue scores. For DAG-state monitoring, side-branch detection, sync verification. $0.02

tools.name: kaspa_chain_density
tools.description: Kaspa chain-blocks (selected-parent chain) vs total DAG blocks per hour. Unique signal not available from generic block-explorer APIs - measures BlockDAG branching activity. Chain ratio drift signals DAG-mode shifts. $0.05

tools.name: kaspa_supply_trend
tools.description: Kaspa circulating supply over time + emission rate + percent-mined. Captures accelerating geometric halving schedule. AI agent API for tokenomics tracking and supply-emission models. Informational research data - not investment advice. $0.03

tools.name: kaspa_diversity
tools.description: Kaspa own-node peer-network breakdown (IPv4/IPv6) + user-agent distribution. AI agent API for network-health monitoring, node-operator analytics. Informational research data - not investment advice. $0.02

tools.name: kaspa_mempool_pulse
tools.description: Kaspa mempool transaction count over time. AI agent API for mempool-state regime detection. Informational research data - not investment advice. $0.02

tools.name: kaspa_blocks
tools.description: Single Kaspa block extract with full DAG topology (parents, selected-parent, blue/daa score, chain-block flag). AI agent API for DAG-aware indexers. Informational research data - not investment advice. $0.02

tools.name: kaspa_recent_blocks
tools.description: Recent Kaspa blocks (max 144 per call = $1.44 cap). Optional chain_only flag to filter selected-parent chain blocks. AI agent API for backtesters and indexers. Informational research data - not investment advice. $0.01

tools.name: subtensor_registration_pulse
tools.description: Bittensor NeuronRegistered count per hour. Tracks new neurons joining subnets - useful for detecting subnet growth/decay and registration-burn pressure. AI agent API for subnet-health analysts. Informational research data - not investment advice. $0.03

tools.name: subtensor_transfer_flow
tools.description: Bittensor BalancesTransfer count + total TAO volume per hour. AI agent API for TAO whale-watch and treasury-movement monitoring. Informational research data - not investment advice. $0.05

tools.name: subtensor_weights_activity
tools.description: Bittensor WeightsSet + TimelockedWeightsCommitted/Revealed activity per hour. Tracks validator weight-setting cadence and the post-2025 anti-frontrun mechanism. AI agent API for validator-behavior analysts. Informational research data - not investment advice. $0.10

tools.name: subtensor_block_metrics
tools.description: Recent per-block aggregation of Bittensor events: neuron_registrations, weight_sets, bond_sets, child_key_sets, stake_added/removed, root_claimed, balance_transfers + total TAO. $0.02

tools.name: subtensor_evm_activity
tools.description: EVM-on-Bittensor Ethereum.Executed call count per hour. Tracks TaoEVM dApp adoption. AI agent API for cross-VM adoption analysts. Informational research data - not investment advice. $0.05

tools.name: subtensor_events
tools.description: All Bittensor substrate events for a single finalized block (event_idx, phase, module_id, event_id, attributes). AI agent API for detailed forensic analysis of specific blocks. Informational research data - not investment advice. $0.02

tools.name: bittensor_subnet
tools.description: Per-subnet Bittensor snapshot: static metadata (modality/owner/burn/kappa/rho) + latest Tier-A metrics + current alpha-token price. Covers all 129 mainnet subnets. $0.02

tools.name: bittensor_subnet_metagraph
tools.description: Full metagraph snapshot for 13 tracked Bittensor subnets [1,3,4,13,15,18,26,56,62,64,91,120,123]: summary stats + all neurons with stake/incentive/dividends/emission/trust/validator_permit. $0.05

tools.name: bittensor_subnet_validators
tools.description: Top-N validators ranked by incentive for tracked Bittensor subnets. Filter only validator_permit=true neurons. AI agent API for validator-selection and stake-delegation decisions. Informational research data - not investment advice. $0.02

tools.name: bittensor_subnet_emission_trend
tools.description: Hourly emission and stake trend for a Bittensor subnet (window: 1h/24h/7d/30d). Derived from bittensor_metagraph snapshots. AI agent API for subnet-momentum tracking. Informational research data - not investment advice. $0.02

tools.name: bittensor_subnets_all
tools.description: Snapshot of all 129 Bittensor mainnet subnets - burn, neurons, owner, modality, alpha-price. For cross-subnet research and market-overview dashboards. $0.05

tools.name: bittensor_alpha_prices
tools.description: Latest alpha-token price per Bittensor subnet (TAO + USD). All 129 subnets in one call. AI agent API for cross-subnet price arbitrage, dTAO portfolio rebalancing. Informational research data - not investment advice. $0.02

tools.name: bittensor_alpha_price_history
tools.description: Time-series of alpha-token price for a single Bittensor subnet (window: 1h/24h/7d/30d). Sourced from bittensor_alpha_prices captured every 10 minutes. AI agent API for alpha-token trading signals. Informational research data - not investment advice. $0.02

tools.name: bittensor_network_fundamentals
tools.description: Latest TAO network-wide fundamentals: total issuance, total stake, free float, supply percentage mined, stake ratio. Snapshot every 10 min. $0.01

tools.name: bittensor_registration_cost_history
tools.description: Hourly Bittensor subnet registration activity (NeuronRegistered event count per subnet) + current burn-cost per subnet. Useful for predicting cheap-registration windows. $0.01

tools.name: bittensor_top_validators_cross_subnet
tools.description: Top-N validators per tracked Bittensor subnet, aggregated across all 13 focus subnets. One call returns the leaderboard across subnets. For cross-subnet validator-research and stake-allocation decisions. $0.05

tools.name: safety_check_quick
tools.description: Carbon-Guard Quick Safety-Check: instant fraud & phishing verdict (safe|warning|scam|uncertain) for any URL, wallet, message, or phone number. input_type: url|wallet|text|phone|token. $0.50

tools.name: safety_check_standard
tools.description: Carbon-Guard Standard Safety-Check: Quick plus AI-powered fraud analysis with reasoning trace. input_type: url|wallet|text|phone|token. $1.00

tools.name: safety_check_deep
tools.description: Carbon-Guard Deep Investigation: full forensic workup, cross-chain checks, multi-language. input_type: url|wallet|text|phone|token. $3.00

tools.name: safety_check_token
tools.description: Carbon-Guard Token Safety-Check: rug-pull & honeypot verdict for ERC-20 tokens across 7 EVM chains. input_type: url|wallet|text|phone|token. $1.00

tools.name: bittensor_mining_viability
tools.description: Subnet mining due-diligence verdict: displacement rate, emission per earning miner, registration pressure, concentration - transparent competitiveness score before you burn registration fees. $0.50

tools.name: bittensor_yield_history
tools.description: Realized Bittensor validator yield per subnet measured from continuous snapshots (30d series + per-validator APR) - not theoretical APY. $0.25

tools.name: bittensor_wallet_reputation
tools.description: Bittensor address reputation verdict from an independent full event archive: registrations, stake behavior, longevity score. Counterparty due-diligence. $0.50

tools.name: bittensor_weights_integrity
tools.description: Validator integrity verdict: copy-cluster detection (identical weight commits), independence score from the timelock weight-commit stream. Vet a subnet before you stake. $0.50

tools.name: bittensor_alpha_risk
tools.description: Bittensor alpha-token risk profile: realized volatility, max drawdown, liquidity proxy, transparent risk score from continuous own price observation. $0.25

tools.name: bittensor_owner_reputation
tools.description: Subnet-owner reputation verdict: operator track-record, stake behavior, longevity and multi-subnet footprint from an independent event archive. $0.50

tools.name: forecast_archive
tools.description: Matured AI forecast archive with realized outcomes - verifiable benchmark dataset of directional and cross-sectional crypto forecasts across major assets. Strictly retrospective. Call the scorecard for the list of covered forecast tracks. $0.10

tools.name: forecast_scorecard
tools.description: Rolling verifiable AI-model quality scorecard on matured forecasts, with disclosed random baselines and standard classification metrics. $0.25

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: safety_check_quick, safety_check_standard, safety_check_deep, safety_check_token · Private data: bittensor_subnet, bittensor_alpha_prices, bittensor_alpha_price_history, safety_check_quick, safety_check_standard, safety_check_deep, safety_check_token, bittensor_wallet_reputation, bittensor_alpha_risk, bittensor_owner_reputation · Public sink: kaspa_toccata_status, kaspa_fee_regime, btc_miner_attribution, btc_diversity, subtensor_weights_activity.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: safety_check_quick, safety_check_standard, safety_check_deep, safety_check_token · Private data: bittensor_subnet, bittensor_alpha_prices, bittensor_alpha_price_history, safety_check_quick, safety_check_standard, safety_check_deep, safety_check_token, bittensor_wallet_reputation, bittensor_alpha_risk, bittensor_owner_reputation · Public sink: kaspa_toccata_status, kaspa_fee_regime, btc_miner_attribution, btc_diversity, subtensor_weights_activity

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
